response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with strong testing discipline, relevant geospatial experience via GISCollective, and low-latency systems work in DLang at Sociomantic/Dunnhumby. However, the role's primary requirement is modern C++ (or Rust), and the candidate's only C/C++ experience is a short stint at National Instruments over a decade ago. No recent C++/Rust, no navigation systems background, and recent work is web/TypeScript-focused. Worth a screening conversation only if the team is open to a strong systems-minded engineer who would need to ramp up on C++.
strengths: Genuine geospatial/GIS domain experience through GISCollective platform
Low-latency, high-throughput backend experience (millions of req/sec at Sociomantic)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling, Linux
concerns: No recent modern C++ or Rust experience — primary technical requirement is unmet
No navigation/routing systems background or map data pipeline exposure
Recent trajectory is web/TypeScript and AI tooling, not systems engineering
